chunks.text: ORDER SHEEI IN IHE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUII COURI LARKANA Consll: PeII: No. D- 777 0/ 20/5. Dole Order wilh sgnolure ol Hon'ble JUUge Eo فمنععط c٥5٤ ٥ق٥ 07.3.2018.
